{
  "action": "create a product outline",
  "status": "completed",
  "reason": "Building on the AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator prompt pack idea, the next logical step is to structure the content into a clear outline.",
  "task": {
    "title": "Outline AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack",
    "details": "Develop a detailed outline for the prompt pack, including sections like introduction, prompt categories (e.g., engagement, promotion, education), prompt structures, customization tips, and examples.",
    "priority": "high"
  },
  "productTitle": "AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator",
  "productType": "prompt pack",
  "niche": "B2B Social Media Marketing",
  "targetBuyer": "Small Business Owners and Marketing Managers",
  "listingTitle": "AI Social Media Post Prompts for Business Growth",
  "shortDescription": "Generate engaging social media posts effortlessly with this AI prompt pack.",
  "priceSuggestion": "Starter Pack/Premium Pack",
  "price": 0,

  "bullets": [
    "Boost engagement with targeted prompts.",
    "Drive sales with promotional post ideas.",
    "Educate your audience with informative content.",
    "Save time on content creation.",
    "Adaptable for various industries."
  ],
  "publishInstructions": "Once the outline is finalized, create the detailed prompts and package them for sale on a platform like Gumroad or Etsy.",
  "fileContent": "Outline:\n\nI. Introduction\n    A. Welcome & Benefits of AI for Social Media\n    B. How to Use This Prompt Pack\n\nII. Prompt Categories\n    A. Engagement Prompts (Questions, Polls, Discussions)\n    B. Promotional Prompts (Product/Service Launches, Discounts, Testimonials)\n    C. Educational Prompts (Tips, How-Tos,

parsedObject.targetBuyer: Small Business Owners and Marketing Managers
parsedObject.listingTitle: AI Social Media Post Prompts for Business Growth
parsedObject.shortDescription: Generate engaging social media posts effortlessly with this AI prompt pack.
parsedObject.description: This product will be an AI-powered social media post generator prompt pack designed to help small business owners and marketing managers save time and create more effective content. It will offer a variety of prompts for different social media goals.
bullets: Drive sales with promotional post ideas.
Educate your audience with informative content.
parsedObject.publishInstructions: Once the outline is finalized, create the detailed prompts and package them for sale on a platform like Gumroad or Etsy.
parsedObject.fileContent:
Outline:

I. Introduction
    A. Welcome & Benefits of AI for Social Media
    B. How to Use This Prompt Pack

II. Prompt Categories
    A. Engagement Prompts (Questions, Polls, Discussions)
    B. Promotional Prompts (Product/Service Launches, Discounts, Testimonials)
    C. Educational Prompts (Tips, How-Tos, Industry Insights)
    D. Behind-the-Scenes Prompts (Company Culture, Team Spotlights)
    E. Trending Topic Prompts

III. Prompt Structure & Best Practices
    A. Core Prompt Components (AI Persona, Goal, Audience, Format, Tone, Keywords, CTA)
    B. Customization Tips
    C. Dos and Don'ts

IV. Example Posts & Case Studies
    A. Showcase generated posts from different categories.
    B. Brief examples of how these prompts can be applied.

V. Conclusion
    A. Encouragement & Next Steps
    B. Support Information
